allOf.description: Configuration for a Splunk logging endpoint.

url.description: The URL to send logs to for the Splunk HTTP Event Collector.

token.description: The Splunk HEC token for authentication.

use_tls.description: Whether to use TLS for the connection.

tls_hostname.description: The hostname to verify the server certificate against.

tls_ca_cert.description: A secure certificate to authenticate a server with.
